Title: OpenClaw's `tools.exec.safeBins` PATH-hijack allowed trojan binaries to bypass allowlist checks
Description: `tools.exec.safeBins` allowlist checks could be bypassed by PATH-hijacked binaries, allowing execution of attacker-controlled trojan binaries under an allowlisted executable name.
NotImpacted: All versions before 2026.1.21, all versions starting from 2026.2.19
